command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '订单号'
ws['B1'] = '发货城市'
ws['C1'] = '目的城市'
ws['D1'] = '运费(元)'
ws['E1'] = '预计天数'
ws['A2'] = 'LG001'
ws['B2'] = '上海'
ws['C2'] = '北京'
ws['D2'] = 25
ws['E2'] = 2
ws['A3'] = 'LG002'
ws['B3'] = '广州'
ws['C3'] = '成都'
ws['D3'] = 35
ws['E3'] = 3
ws['A4'] = 'LG003'
ws['B4'] = '北京'
ws['C4'] = '杭州'
ws['D4'] = 20
ws['E4'] = 2
ws['A5'] = 'LG004'
ws['B5'] = '深圳'
ws['C5'] = '武汉'
ws['D5'] = 30
ws['E5'] = 3
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/logistics.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 从/home/user/Desktop/logistics.xlsx中找到运费最低的订单，在/home/user/Desktop/logistics_memo.txt末尾追加：'最低运费订单：LG003（20元，北京→杭州）'，保存
